text.title: Agentic AI Product Development — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid agentic-AI product spec: goal state, enumerated autonomous actions, escalation triggers, primary metrics, and a behavioural-regression hook.

example.note: Goal not machine-verifiable; action lacks trigger; metric uses click-through instead of agentic unit metric.

antipattern.description: metrics using click-through-rate or cost-per-user as primary
antipattern.reason: Wrong scaling axis for agentic systems.

list.item: goal_state.predicate is a concrete expression (operators, fields, values).
metrics include all three agentic unit metrics.
